title: IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 发布！| IntelliJ IDEA 博客
author: Maria Kosukhina
content:
IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 brings powerful updates to help you stay productive, write better code, and confidently adopt the latest technologies.

You can download this version from our website, update directly from within the IDE, use the free Toolbox App, or install it via snap packages for Ubuntu.

This blog post gives you a quick overview of the release highlights. For the full list of the latest features and their demos, check out our newly redesigned What’s New page.

Explore the What’s New page

Release highlights at a glance

Smarter AI-assisted workflows

  • AI Assistant: New capabilities and better accuracy, now available for free
  • Junie: Enhanced performance and MCP client support
  • IntelliJ IDEA as an MCP server for third-party AI agents
  • Smarter, context-aware assistance for database workflows

Support for cutting-edge technologies

  • Java 25 Early Access
  • Maven 4
  • JSpecify

Major experience improvements for Spring developers

  • Spring Debugger plugin
  • Spring Modulith support

Other notable updates

  • Virtual thread debugging
  • Support for new Scala features
  • Improved experience when your subscription expires
  • Database workflow enhancements  
  • Web development updates 
  • Native Bazel support

A new way to explore what’s new and what’s fixed

With this release, we’re introducing a new approach to sharing updates, designed to make our communication more focused and transparent.

We’re now splitting release information into two distinct but equally important parts:

  • The What’s New page provides a curated overview of the most impactful new features and capabilities – everything that expands what you can do with the IDE.
  • The What’s Fixed blog post is dedicated to meaningful quality-of-life improvements, from performance boosts and UI refinements to long-requested bug fixes and workflow enhancements that make your IDE feel faster, smoother, and more reliable.

The What’s Fixed in IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 blog post will be published shortly – stay tuned!

Try it now and watch our upcoming overview video!

Get IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 today and explore the new features for yourself.

Download IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2

We’ll be hosting a special episode of IntelliJ IDEA Talk, where our Developer Advocates will demo and discuss the release highlights in detail, sharing their thoughts on how these updates can improve your daily development workflow. Check out the agenda and set a reminder! See you there!

As always, your feedback is important to us. Let us know what you think about the new features in this release – your input helps us shape IntelliJ IDEA so it works best for you.

Join the conversation on X, LinkedIn, or Bluesky, and if you run into any issues, please report them via YouTrack. For the complete list of changes in the 2025.2 version, refer to the release notes.

Thank you for using IntelliJ IDEA, and happy developing!

aiSummary: IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 引入增强的 AI 辅助功能、Java 25 的早期访问以及 Spring 开发者的重大改进，旨在提高生产力并支持尖端技术。
oneSentenceSummary: IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 引入增强的 AI 辅助功能、Java 25 的早期访问以及 Spring 开发者的重大改进，旨在提高生产力并支持尖端技术。
summary: 本文宣布了 IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 的发布，重点介绍了各个领域的关键更新。它强调了通过 AI 助手和 Junie 的新功能实现的更智能的 AI 辅助工作流程，以及对第三方 AI 代理的支持。新版本还包括对 Java 25、Maven 4 和 JSpecify 等尖端技术的早期访问。Spring 开发者将受益于重大的体验改进，包括新的 Spring 调试器插件和 Spring 模块化应用支持。其他值得注意的更新包括虚拟线程调试、新的 Scala 功能和数据库增强功能。该帖子还详细介绍了一种新的发布沟通方式，将信息分为“新增功能”页面（针对功能）和“已修复内容”博客文章（针对质量改进）。它鼓励用户下载新版本，并提供指向其他资源的链接，例如详细的“新增功能”页面和即将发布的概述视频。

mainPoints.point: 增强的 AI 集成通过改进的 AI 助手功能显著提高生产力。
mainPoints.explanation: 新的人工智能功能，包括更高的准确性和 AI 助手的免费可用性，旨在简化编码工作流程，提供更智能、上下文感知的帮助，并扩展到数据库操作，例如查询优化。

mainPoints.point: 该版本为 Java 25 等新兴技术提供早期访问和全面支持。
mainPoints.explanation: 这确保了开发人员可以利用最新的语言功能和构建工具，使他们的项目保持现代和面向未来，并促进尽早采用尖端技术。

mainPoints.point: 有针对性的 Spring 开发者改进，例如 Spring 调试器插件，增强了开发体验。
mainPoints.explanation: 这些专门的更新解决了常见痛点，并引入了新功能，从而使 Spring 框架开发人员能够更轻松、更高效地调试和管理模块化应用程序。

keyQuotes: IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2 带来了强大的更新，可帮助您保持高效、编写更好的代码并自信地采用最新技术。
AI 助手：新功能和更高的准确性，现在可以免费使用。
在此版本中，我们引入了一种新的更新共享方法，旨在使我们的沟通更加集中和透明。
“新增功能”页面提供了对最具影响力的新功能和特性的精选概述——所有这些都扩展了您在 IDE 中可以实现的功能。
